description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a black synthetic body and a metallic barrel. The rifle features a skeletonized, adjustable stock and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The handguard is ribbed and extends along the barrel, providing a secure grip and heat dissipation. A detachable box magazine is visible below the receiver, and the rifle is equipped with standard iron sights. The muzzle end is fitted with a flash hider, and the overall design suggests durability and functionality for urban environments. The finish is matte with some metallic highlights, and the construction appears robust, suitable for demanding use.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a skeletonized adjustable stock, ribbed handguard, detachable box magazine, and flash hider.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, skeletonized stock, pistol grip, ribbed handguard, detachable magazine, and flash hider.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, flash hider, and narrow profile of the handguard and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the skeletonized stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
